comments.body:
Hello Belvish,

Thank you for reaching out with your query.

As of now, integration of Blitz Logistics services is not available with the app.

We will be happy to check the integration feasibility for this logistics service. For this, could you please share the following details -
- Online URL of the logistics provider.
- Direct contact with the logistics team (email and/or phone number)
- API documents which can help with feasibility testing.
- Expected volume of shipments you will be shipping with this logistics service.


Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Belvish,
 
Thank you for reaching out with your query.
 
As of now, integration of Blitz Logistics services is not available with the app.
 
We will be happy to check the integration feasibility for this logistics service. For this, could you please share the following details - 
  • Online URL of the logistics provider.
  • Direct contact with the logistics team (email and/or phone number)
  • API documents which can help with feasibility testing.
  • Expected volume of shipments you will be shipping with this logistics service.
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

Hello Belvish,

I have an update on your case.

Our partnership team has tried reaching out to Deepak and Arushi a couple of times but have not been able to get in touch with them.

As such, I would request you to introduce Abhilash, Partnership Manager at PluginHive to the carrier team in a new email. This will enable our team to establish a communication channel with them for quicker resolution of the case.

Let us know if you have any other queries in the meantime.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Deepak and Arushi,


Greetings.

Could you please connect with Touseef to get Blitz activated in our PluginHive application? This is required so that we can start using their services for our future shipments.

The API credentials and relevant documentation have already been shared earlier. As I understand, the Blitz team had also tried reaching out previously, but the discussion could not be taken forward.

I would suggest using this email thread as a common platform to coordinate and assist each other with the activation process. Please let us know if any additional information or support is required from our end.

Looking forward to your assistance in getting this completed at the earliest.



Kindest

Jaspreet Singh

Belvish.com

comments.body:
Hello Jaspreet Singh,

Thank you for your time on the call.

As discussed, we are willing to add **Blitznow integration** to our app to support your requirements.

Since this integration is being requested specifically for your use case and has not been requested by other merchants so far, we would require your commitment to continue using the app for at least the next 12 months before we proceed with the development.

Please confirm if this works for you. Upon receiving your confirmation, we will initiate the process for the integration.

We look forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Jaspreet Singh,
 
Thank you for your time on the call.
 
As discussed, we are willing to add Blitznow integration to our app to support your requirements.
 
Since this integration is being requested specifically for your use case and has not been requested by other merchants so far, we would require your commitment to continue using the app for at least the next 12 months before we proceed with the development.
 
Please confirm if this works for you. Upon receiving your confirmation, we will initiate the process for the integration.
 
We look forward to your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Touseef,



Thank you so much for your support in facilitating the integration of Blitz with your systems. We truly appreciate the assistance provided throughout the process.

We are pleased to continue our association with you for the next 12 months and look forward to a successful partnership ahead.

Additionally, we would recommend promoting Blitz’s services to your other clients as well. Based on our experience so far, we believe many of them would find Blitz to be a valuable delivery partner and would be keen to explore the solution for their shipping requirements.

Once again, thank you for your support, and we look forward to working together in the coming months.

Thanks again.



Kindest

Jaspreet Singh

Once again, thank you for your support, and we look forward to working together in the coming months.

Thanks again.

Kindest
Jaspreet Singh

comments.body:
Hi Team,

We have received a new carrier integration request from our customer belvish.myshopify.com. The customer is currently on our $49 plan and has been with us for the past 2 years.

The requested carrier is BlitzNow, a last-mile logistics provider that enables D2C brands to offer 30–60 minute, same-day, and next-day deliveries through its dark store and delivery network across metro cities. BlitzNow is already integrated with platforms such as eShipz, ClickPost, Shiprocket, and Unicommerce.

I have completed the initial discussions with the BlitzNow team and collected the required API documentation and test credentials for evaluation. Please find the details below:

- **API Documention** - https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/34429304/2sB34eKhYC#ec5df567-1dce-43ed-9e45-e837afcf2783
- **Username** - YYyqOnG0g9Nc
- **Password** - pb=$+:.?y0*Lg


**Login URL:** https://app.blitznow.in/login
**username:** abhilash@pluginhive.com
**password:** PH@Blitz@2026 - please check PluginHive phone to get the auth code

Could we please review this integration request and let me know if we are willing to take this up? Please share this with the L3 team for review.

(Abhilash)

🤖 Auto-generated draft — customer reply (probation mode)
Product: shopify-mcsl | Signal: form_field | Confidence: HIGH | Context: 32 message(s)
─────────────────────────────────────────────

Hello Jaspreet Singh,

Thank you for following up, and we appreciate your patience through this process.

Here is the latest status: our development team has reviewed the BlitzNow API documentation and test credentials, and the integration has been formally added to our development queue as of June 16. The team has everything they need from the BlitzNow side to proceed with the build.

We do not have a confirmed go-live date to share at this time. Our team will reach out to you as soon as there is a concrete update on the development timeline.

Thanks & Regards,
Team PluginHive

⚡ This response was generated automatically by PluginHive AI Support. A team member will follow up if you need further assistance.

Thank you for the followup.
 
Our team will be providing the integration of Blitznow in the app. As of now, there are no blockers on our end for the integration.
 
Howerver, we will be able to provide you an exact timeline on the enhancement by Monday EOD.
 
We appreciate your patience and understanding.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Jaspreet,

We apologize for missing the Monday timeline we committed to — that was not acceptable and we understand the impact this delay is having on your operations.

Here is the current status: the BlitzNow integration is actively in development. However, on June 26, our engineering team ran into a blocker with the test credentials provided by BlitzNow — the authentication is returning an error, and our team has already reached out to the BlitzNow team (Deepak) directly to get this resolved. The integration timeline depends on how quickly this credential issue is unblocked on BlitzNow's end.

We are escalating this internally to get a firm timeline to you as soon as the credential issue is cleared. If you are able to follow up with Deepak or Sumanth at BlitzNow to expedite their response on the test credentials, that would help us move faster on our end as well.

We will come back to you with an update by end of this week.

Thanks & Regards,
Team PluginHive

⚡ To help you faster, this reply was drafted automatically by PluginHive's AI assistant. Our team reviews every AI reply and will follow up to confirm it's fully resolved.
